other_observers: Roger Massey found bird earlier in the morning, I saw the bird with Chris Knight, Robb Hinds, Al Gardner, John Drummond, Aaron and Pati Driscoll on Feb 26th, and many others on Feb 27th and 28th.
description: The bird called a lot, which was fun to hear.  Duck with red head, golden crown stripe, gray sides.  Likely the same bird for December 2021, at the same location.  The pond was open, and a lot of ducks today. See photos.
photographer: Photographer: Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon K Percival
